fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> pairs an image (as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" />) with a display duration for use in animated WebP encoding via <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder" />.

## Examples

```csharp
var frames = new SKWebpEncoderFrame[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap1, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap2, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100))
};
var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, options);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP image.

params.duration: The display duration of this frame.
params.bitmap: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap" /> to use as the frame image.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a bitmap and duration.

params.duration: The display duration of this frame.
params.image: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKImage" /> to use as the frame image.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from an image and duration.

params.pixmap: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> to use as the frame image.
params.duration: The display duration of this frame.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a pixmap and duration.

fields.value: The <see cref="T:System.TimeSpan" /> for which this frame is displayed in the animation.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the display duration of this frame.

fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing this frame's image data. Must not be <see langword="null" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
